fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.butter: A small bushel, filled to the brim with nectar and lavender pods. Butterflies love to gather near it due to it's sweet aroma. Found in Meadows and Flower Forests.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.candy_: This is a pearly red Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of peach and purple flowers.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.orange: A  flower with blooming, pure orange petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of red and yellow Pansies.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.lupine: A tall flower with tightly bunched white petals. As long as grass can grow, you will find Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.blue_f: A  flower with blooming, blue frost petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of white and ourple Pansies
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.manhat: A tall flower with tightly bunched petals that are colored like a sunset. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of golden, purple and pink Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.pink_p: A  flower with blooming, pure pink petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of red and white Pansies
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.lavend: This is a lavender Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of white and purple flowers.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.purple: A tall flower with tightly bunched purple petals. As long as grass can grow, you will find Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.sky_bl: A tall flower with tightly bunched sky blue petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of white and purple Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.lupine: A tall flower with tightly bunched pink petals. As long as grass can grow, you will find Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.red_hy: A red Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.hallow: A  flower with blooming, dark violet petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of purple and orange Pansies. Halloween flowers can only be bred in low light.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.red_pa: A  flower with blooming, pure red petals. Found all over nature.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.white_: A  flower with blooming, pure white petals. Found all over nature.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.sunset: This is a sunset Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of peach and white flowers.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.hydran: A blue Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.peach_: This is a peach Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. They can be found in many biomes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.white_: This is a white Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. They can be found in many biomes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.pink_h: A pink Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of white and red petals.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.golden: A tall flower with tightly bunched golden petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of two white Lupines.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.hallow: A Halloween Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of purple and red petals. Halloween flowers can only be bred in low light.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.pink_c: A sturdy Crown Cactus with beautiful pink petals. They grow in Deserts and Badlands and are very resilient.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.white_: A small carpet of flowers found in Dark and Birch Forests, liverwort come in many different colors. These ones are white!
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.orange: A sturdy Crown Cactus with beautiful orange petals. They grow in Deserts and Badlands and are very resilient.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.twinfl: A collection of small white forest lillies who have grown tall and fallen to their hubris.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.hallow: This is a Halloween Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of sunset and purple flowers. Halloween flowers can only be bred in low light.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.purple: This is a purple Foxglove. Foxgloves have thick bunches of flowers on their stem. They can be found in many biomes.
A purple Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.blanke: A miniature cousin of the sunflower, blanket flowers are found in Beaches and Savannahs, and can be tightly packed into groups on a single blocks.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.firewe: Tall, dry, pink plants that, are said to resemble flames when spotted on the horizon of their native plains and meadows.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.purple: A small carpet of flowers found in Dark and Birch Forests, liverwort come in many different colors. These ones are purple!
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.blue_l: A small carpet of flowers found in Dark and Birch Forests, liverwort come in many different colors. These ones are blue!
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.sunris: A  flower with blooming, radiant petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of orange, pink and yellow Pansies.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.panola: A  flower with blooming, bright pink petals. Unique to breeding, this is a rare combination of pink and white Pansies.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.white_: A white Hydrangea. These flowers have bouquet-like petals and grow in bushes.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.yellow: A  flower with blooming, pure yellow petals. Found all over nature.
fieldguide.block.serene_shrubbery.purple: A  flower with blooming, pure purple petals. Found all over nature.
